name: PD
title: Senior Data Scientist & AI Engineer
summary: Senior Data Scientist specializing in statistical modeling, machine learning, and decision science. Experienced in building scalable analytical platforms that simplify complex modeling and enable data-driven decision making through causal inference, experimentation, and applied AI.

highlights: Applies statistical modeling, causal inference, experimentation, and AI to business problems
Builds scalable analytical workflows and communicates findings to cross-functional stakeholders
Developed Python-based automation tools to streamline laboratory workflows

projects.name: AI Trading Arena
projects.description: Multi-strategy trading dashboard: $10K virtual capital, 4+ strategies (LLM AI Analyst, ML Quant, DCA portfolios, S&P 500), automated daily data pipeline, fully transparent

projects.name: AI Agent Platform
projects.description: Multi-agent orchestration system with specialized AI workers (coder, writer, researcher, data miner), coordinated by central orchestrator. Features task delegation, memory management, context-aware decision making across Discord/Telegram/web.
